narrative: Pearl consolidated after the spike. Volume-weighted PRL settled at $1.4477 (-5.0% 24h) on $572.6k of cross-venue activity — softer than yesterday’s $854k peak but still ~7× the pre-rally baseline, and venue count grew 6 → 8 as two more Uniswap v4 pools (WPRL/USDC and WPRL/ETH) opened LPs. The bridge’s pending-mint queue cleared as expected: minted WPRL jumped +79% to 353,029 with custody climbing to 361,675 PRL, normalizing surplus back to a healthy 2.45% (down from the transient 43.28% buffer yesterday). Network hashrate kept pushing higher at 22.72 EH/s with block times tightening to ~109s, even though MinePRL pool active GPUs eased 158 → 67 — pool concentration shifted while network capacity continued to grow. Code velocity stayed high (public-frontend 44 commits/7d, gating mint-completed on MintExecuted events; PearlWallet steady at 5/7d after the v0.3.0 vault deeplink); the L1 repo picked up 17 more stars to 122.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: dexscreener:tokens/0x07696DcaB55E62cfef953666b29Fe1970518cB00 (8 Ethereum pairs aggregated, volume-weighted price; change excludes one new pool with null 24h change)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: Minted WPRL +79% in 24h (196,802 → 353,029): yesterday’s flagged 78k-PRL pending-mint queue cleared into the canonical ERC-20 supply, pulling surplus back from 43.28% to 2.45% — the predicted normalization landed. ~7.8k PRL still queued in deposit addresses for the next mint window.
Bridge custody +28% to 361,675 PRL — sustained inflow, not the one-off backfill from yesterday.

MinePRL pool active GPUs 158 → 67 while network hashrate continued to climb (19.21 → 22.72 EH/s, +18%): pool share consolidated to 0.099%, capacity is concentrating in a smaller set of larger miners rather than the broad pool.

social.summary: X API not exercised this run. After a parabolic four-day stretch the price took a -5% breather while bridge and hashrate growth kept climbing — neutral read pending a sampled-tweets pass.

github.last_commit_msg: bug fix for bitcoin utils package serializing OP_PUSHDATA1 opcode (#115)
lock-and-mint: gate "WPRL minted" on MintExecuted, not raw receipt success
